name: 以智取勝打臉反派
description: 女主設計引誘皇后親自到東宮行刺太子，人贓並獲，一舉扳倒皇后及其家族。觀眾在前期積累的對皇后的憤怒在此刻得到徹底釋放。女主從一個卑微宮女反過來操控了最高權力博弈，逆襲感極強。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: The empress secretly trespassed into the Eastern Palace tonight, attempting to harm the crown prince with irrefutable evidence. The case is conclusive. Do you still wish to argue? ... You You actually conspired together to scheme against me.
